description: BlindBench evaluation dataset export schema. Defines the structure of records returned by the dataset-export edge function.

fields.name: response_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this model response

fields.name: truth_score
fields.description: Factual accuracy score (0.0-1.0), null if no factual claims

fields.name: failure_type
fields.description: Primary reasoning failure type, null if no failure detected

fields.name: stability_score
fields.description: Response consistency across repeated runs (0.0-1.0), null if not tested

fields.name: vote_winner
fields.description: The model that won the blind vote for this prompt

fields.name: won_vote
fields.description: Whether this response's model won the blind vote
